teach.description: Interview-style setup. Writes BRAND.md (and optional VOICE.md, VISUAL.md).

voice.description: Analyze brand voice from a URL or pasted samples; write VOICE.md.

style.description: Analyze visual style from a URL or image directory; write VISUAL.md.

article.description: Generate a long-form, brand-voiced, fact-checked article (SEO + AEO + GEO).

short.description: Generate a short-form post (LinkedIn, X, threads).

cluster.description: Generate a pillar + supporting articles with an internal link map.

image.description: Compose a brand-styled image prompt (model-agnostic; emit or call a provider).

video.description: Script + storyboard + per-scene image prompts + motion spec. Optional provider call.

humanize.description: Strip AI patterns, banned phrases, generic openings. Re-rhythm.

factcheck.description: Three-model council. Claim-by-claim verdict with citations.

shorten.description: Extract a short-form post from a long article.

polish.description: Final brand pass: voice match, banned-phrase sweep, schema check.

audit.description: Quantitative score 0-100 across SEO, AEO, GEO, voice match, factuality.

critique.description: Qualitative critique with prioritized issues and persona red flags.

bakeoff.description: Same topic across N models. Side-by-side diff.

seo.description: Extract/inject SEO metadata, FAQ schema, and structured data.

aeo.description: Restructure for answer engines (inverted pyramid, Q&A blocks, citations).

geo.description: Generative engine optimization pass (sources, freshness, unique insight).

publish.description: Emit final HTML + JSON-LD + image-prompt bundle for any CMS.

evals.description: Run eval rubric against existing content.
